scripts.test: tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.app.json src/components/integrations/ZendeskConnectionCard.test.tsx && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.app.json src/components/UpgradePrompt.test.tsx && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.app.json src/pages/MarketplacePage.test.tsx && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.app.json src/pages/ConnectorDetailPage.test.tsx && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.app.json src/components/charts/BenchmarkChart.test.tsx && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.app.json src/lib/posthogConnectionView.test.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.app.json src/pages/settings/TeamTab.test.tsx && vitest run src/components/integrations/WebhookConfig.test.tsx src/components/settings/BenchmarkSettings.test.tsx src/pages/BenchmarkPage.test.tsx
